name: Baccala Alla Bolognese (Btvc62a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the cod in a deep dish, add cold water to cover, and let it soak for 2 days in the refrigerator, changing the water several times.
2. Rinse and dry the fish, then cut it into 2-inch chunks.
3. Dredge the fish in flour, shaking off the excess.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons butter and olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the fish pieces and brown them well on all sides.
6. Sprinkle the fish with minced garlic and parsley, then stir gently.
7. Cut the remaining 2 tablespoons butter into bits and add it to the pan.
8. Sprinkle the fish with salt and pepper, then pour over the lemon juice.
9. Serve immediately.
